Bash(git commit -m "fix: Budget controlled inputs, dashboard real stats, breathing animation, activity feed wired

FIX 1 - Budget inline editing: complete rewrite with controlled inputs ✅
• Replaced defaultValue with proper value props and onChange handlers
• Combined budget update logic to update both fields atomically in single Supabase call
• Fixed ""every other field"" save issue with controlled React state management
• Enhanced budget history logging for both prevu/depense changes
• Removed document.getElementById approach for React-native state handling

FIX 2 - Dashboard stats: real Supabase data integration ✅
• Updated projects query to use Supabase joins: tasks(id,status,progress,end_date), reserves(id,status)
• Replaced hardcoded mock stats (overdueCount=3, reservesCount=2) with calculated real data  
• Enhanced ProjectCard with overdue/reserves counts and conditional styling
• Added today date comparison for overdue task calculation
• Replaced ""budget"" column with ""retard"" showing overdue task count

FIX 3 - Breathing animation: active project indicators ✅
• Added @keyframes breathe animation to globals.css (2s ease-in-out infinite)
• Replaced emoji green dot with Tailwind animate-ping for ""Actifs"" stats pill
• Enhanced ""Actif"" project card badges with animated green dot (h-1.5 w-1.5)  
• Used dual-layer approach: animate-ping background + solid foreground dot
• Consistent green-400 opacity-75 + green-500 solid color scheme

FIX 4 - Activity feed: verification and enhancement ✅ 
• Added activity_feed table existence check with console logging in dashboard useEffect
• Verified all required activity inserts present in codebase:
  - artisan/[token]/page.tsx: photo_uploaded + task_completed  
  - projects/[id]/page.tsx: task_completed (2 locations)
  - ReservesList.tsx: reserve_opened
• Enhanced ActivityFeed component with loading state (3 pulse skeleton items)
• Improved empty state messaging with explanation for users
• Fixed Supabase async/await syntax replacing .then().catch() patterns

FIX 5 - Recent activity per project card ✅
• Added recentActivities state management in dashboard
• Implemented project-specific activity fetching with groupBy project_id logic  
• Enhanced ProjectCard props interface with lastActivity optional prop
• Added ""Dernière activité"" section with description, time ago, and border separator
• Created timeAgo utility function (m/h/j format) matching ActivityFeed implementation
• Integrated activity display conditional rendering in project cards

🛠️ Technical improvements:
• Fixed all remaining Supabase .catch() syntax errors with proper try/catch blocks
• Enhanced error handling across activity feed related components  
• Type-safe activity data interfaces with proper optional chaining
• Consistent French localization for all new UI elements
